questiontext.text: For the topic Chapter 2 — Unit II — Rings, ideals, polynomial rings and unique factorisation domains, compute \( {a}^{2}+{b}^{2} \).

name.text: Chapter 2 — Unit II — Rings, ideals, polynomial rings and unique factorisation domains

questiontext.text: For lines \({a}x+{b}y={c}\) and \({a}x+{b}y={d}\) with \({c}\ne{d}\), the system has:

generalfeedback.text: Same coefficients, different RHS \(\Rightarrow\) parallel non-coincident lines \(\Rightarrow\) no solution.
